creator: piotr.smyrak@heron.pl
text:
When thunar file manager is running with volume manager plugin loaded mounting attached geli device is impossible. 

Mount only shows a message:
mount: /dev/$DEVICE.eli : Operation not permitted

Closing thunar does not fixes this. Probably due to a service running in background.

How-To-Repeat: Steps to reproduce:
1. install sysutils/thunar-volman-plugin
2. create geli encrypted device, do not attach yet
3. run thunar, and go to Edit | Preferences | Advanced to enable mounting drives with volume manager plugin
4. let thunar run with loaded volman
5. attach the geli device
6. try to mount attached eli device
